title: Game News Round-Up
summary: Daily curated games-industry news digest for 15 May 2024.

items.title: **Dead by Daylight** roguelite gets a surprise release, and 2 million copies are free
bullets: Titled What the Fog, the game was revealed on Tuesday during a Dead by Daylight eighth anniversary broadcast
Two million copies of What the Fog are being given away for free to players who sign in to or create a Behaviour account
The game is also available on Steam for $4.99 / £4.29

Dead by Daylight’s anniversary broadcast was also used to announce Dungeons & Dragons and Castlevania chapters for the multiplayer action horror game, plus a 2V8 game mode that pits two killers against eight survivors on a much larger map
The Dungeons & Dragons chapter launches on June 3, while more info on the Castlevania chapter will be revealed on August 6

items.title: Amazon has greenlit a **Tomb Raider** TV series from Phoebe Waller-Bridge
bullets: The British actress, screenwriter and producer, who won Emmy, Golden Globe and BAFTA awards for her work on Fleabag, will serve as writer and executive producer on the TV show

items.title: **Fortnite **to appeal €1.1m fine over "unfair commercial practices aimed at children"
bullets: ACM says that Fortnite used ads aimed at encouraging kids to make purchases with slogans such as "get it now", and "misleading" sale countdown timers that gave the impression certain items would be removed from sale before they ultimately were.

items.title: Two **Joy-Con** lawsuits against **Nintendo **are dismissed
bullets: Diaz vs. Nintendo and Carbajal vs. Nintendo we moved for the dismissal by both the Mario maker and parents involved

items.title: **Xbox**'s "Transparency Report" H2
bullets: From the six months that ended December 31, 2023, Xbox users issued 27.44 million reports (Up from 10.31 million in H2 2023)
12.74 million (47%) user reports regarding communication with others
11.34 million (41%) reports involving unsportsmanlike conduct (cheating)
3.36 million (12%) reports related to user-generated content
7.32 million proactive enforcements for cheating and inauthentic accounts
138,000 recordings captured by the Xbox voice reporting feature
98% of users showed better behavior after receiving a strike
674 reports to the National Center for Missing and Exploited Children
2,076 referrals to Crisis Text Line
179,000 players appealed against suspensions
7% of appeals were successful

items.title: The Lego Zelda Great Deku Tree will be released in September for €300, it’s claimed
bullets: The set will include two different designs for the tree, one based on The Legend of Zelda Ocarina of Time, and another based on The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild
It’s claimed that if owners want to change the design, the tree will have to be completely rebuilt.
